context: Tests whether the response correctly solves the three-column flexbox centering problem.

checklist.name: Identifies the margin-auto centering limitation
checklist.description: Explains that margin-auto distributes remaining space, so unequal left/right elements cause the center to shift

checklist.name: Provides a working solution
checklist.description: Suggests a valid approach: equal-width flex children (flex: 1), CSS Grid with 3 columns, or absolute positioning for the center element

checklist.name: Solution achieves true centering
checklist.description: The proposed solution actually centers the menu items relative to the viewport/container, not relative to remaining space

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: CSS properties and values are correct and would work as described
